about.title: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS — Reliable Passenger Transport Operator in London
about.subtitle: Transfers, Corporate Transport and Group Travel
about.paragraph1: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is a transport company that organises passenger travel in London and beyond.
about.paragraph2: We work with private clients, companies and groups.
about.paragraph3: We build every trip as a managed process — from receiving the request to completing the route. This approach ensures a consistent level of service, regardless of the transport format and number of passengers.

services.title: Transfers and Transport for Any Task
services.subtitle: We arrange travel in London and beyond — from individual transfers to group and corporate transport.

private.description: Weddings, events, city and long-distance travel. Having our own fleet reduces reliance on third-party resources and improves service reliability.

advantages.title: Why clients choose LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS for private and corporate transport
advantages.subtitle: Working with private and corporate clients, providing managed and predictable transport solutions
advantages.description:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS works with a wide range of clients — from private individuals to companies and organised groups. Our operating model allows us to adapt the transport format to the client's needs, ensuring a consistent level of service and oversight regardless of the order scale.

We do not offer one-size-fits-all solutions — every journey is built around the client's requirements, trip format, and organisational conditions.

whoWeServe.title: Who we serve
whoWeServe.privateClients: Private clients: individual travel, airport transfers, family trips and private events.
whoWeServe.corporateClients: Corporate clients: companies requiring systematic transport for employees, guests, business meetings and events.
whoWeServe.educational: Educational institutions: schools, colleges and universities organising travel for students and groups.
whoWeServe.tourGroups: Tour and organised groups: tour operators, travel groups and trip organisers.
whoWeServe.eventOrganizers: Event organisers: weddings, private events, corporate outings and other occasions.

privacy.text: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS processes personal data provided in this form exclusively for the purpose of processing your enquiry, arranging transport, and communicating with you. Your data will not be used for marketing purposes without your separate consent and will not be shared with third parties, except where necessary to fulfil the service (e.g. with drivers or carrier partners). You have the right to request access to your data, its correction, or deletion.

1.title: General Information
1.content:
This Privacy Policy describes how LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS processes the personal data of website users.

Company: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD
Jurisdiction: England and Wales
Registration Number: 00000000
Registered Office: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom

LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is a data controller within the meaning of UK GDPR.

2.title: What Data We Collect

3.title: Purposes of Data Processing

4.title: Legal Basis for Processing

5.title: Data Transfer to Third Parties
5.content:
We may share data with:
- drivers and transport partners;
- contractors involved in service delivery.

Data is shared exclusively to the extent necessary to provide the service.

6.title: Data Retention
6.content: Personal data is retained no longer than necessary for the purposes of processing or in accordance with legal requirements.

7.title: User Rights

8.title: Data Security
8.content: The company takes reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect personal data.

9.title: Data Enquiries
9.content: For data processing enquiries, you may contact LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS using the contact details provided on the website.

10.title: Policy Changes
10.content: The company reserves the right to amend this Privacy Policy.

1.title: General Information
1.content:
This Cookie Policy explains how LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS uses cookies and similar technologies on the website.

The use of cookies is regulated by:
- UK GDPR;
- Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations, PECR.

2.title: What Are Cookies
2.content:
Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device when visiting a website. They allow the website to recognise the user's device and remember certain information.

Cookies may be:
- session cookies, deleted when the browser is closed;
- persistent cookies, stored on the device for a defined period.

3.title: What Cookies We Use
3.content:
Strictly necessary cookies are essential for the website to function correctly and do not require user consent. They are used to provide basic functionality, remember user choices, and ensure security.

Analytical cookies are used to analyse user behaviour and improve website performance. These cookies are only used with user consent.

Functional cookies allow the website to remember user preferences, such as language or interface settings. They are only used with consent, unless they are strictly necessary.

4.title: Legal Basis for Using Cookies
4.content: Strictly necessary cookies are used on the basis of legitimate interest. All other cookies are used exclusively on the basis of user consent.

5.title: Obtaining Consent

6.title: Managing Cookies

7.title: Third-Party Cookies
7.content:
We may use third-party services, such as analytics tools, that set cookies on their own behalf.

Such third parties process data in accordance with their own privacy policies.

8.title: Cookie Retention Period

9.title: Policy Changes
9.content: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS reserves the right to update this Policy at any time. The current version is always available on the website.

10.title: Contact Information
10.content: For enquiries related to the use of cookies, you may contact LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS using the contact details provided on the website.

1.title: General Provisions
1.content:
These Terms of Use govern access to and use of this website, owned by LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS.

By using the website, the user confirms that they have read these Terms and accept them in full.

If the user does not agree with the Terms, they must cease using the website.

2.title: Company Information
2.content:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD, Private Limited Company, registered in England and Wales.

Company Number: 00000000
Registered Office: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom
VAT Number: GB 000000000

3.title: Purpose of the Website

4.title: No Public Offer
4.content:
All information published on the website is for informational purposes only and does not constitute a public offer or legally binding proposal.

A service contract is concluded separately after terms have been agreed with the client.

5.title: Use of the Website

6.title: Limitation of Liability
6.content:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS does not guarantee that the website will operate continuously and without errors, or that the information on the website is always complete and up to date.

The company is not liable for any losses arising from the use of the website, technical failures, or temporary unavailability of the website.

To the maximum extent permitted by the laws of England and Wales, the liability of LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is excluded.

7.title: Website Information and Content
7.content:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS makes reasonable efforts to ensure the accuracy of information but does not guarantee its completeness or currency.

The company reserves the right to change the content of the website without prior notice.

8.title: Intellectual Property
8.content:
All materials published on the website, including texts, design, graphics, and logos, are the property of LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS or are used under lawful licence.

Any use of materials without written permission is prohibited.

9.title: Third-Party Links
9.content: The website may contain links to third-party websites. LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS does not control and is not responsible for the content of such websites.

10.title: Privacy and Cookies

11.title: Changes to Terms
11.content:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS reserves the right to amend these Terms at any time. The current version is published on the website.

Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

12.title: Applicable Law
12.content:
These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.

All disputes are subject to the jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales.

1.title: General Provisions
1.content:
These Terms govern the provision of transport services by LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS.

By ordering services, the client confirms acceptance of these Terms.

2.title: Company Information
2.content:
LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD, Private Limited Company, registered in England and Wales.

Company Number: 00000000
Registered Office: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom
VAT Number: GB 000000000

3.title: Services

4.title: Booking and Confirmation

5.title: Pricing and Payment

6.title: Cancellation and Amendment

7.title: No-Show
7.content:
If the client does not arrive at the agreed time and place:
- the booking is deemed to have been fulfilled;
- payment is not refunded.

For airport transfers, the driver waits for a reasonable time after the flight has landed.

8.title: Waiting Time
8.content:
- Waiting time may be included in the price or calculated separately;
- Additional waiting time is charged separately.

9.title: Flight Delays
9.content:
For airport transfers, the company monitors the flight status. In the event of a delay, vehicle dispatch is adjusted wherever possible.

The company is not liable for delays caused by third parties.

10.title: Client Responsibility

11.title: Luggage
11.content:
- The client must inform in advance of the quantity and type of luggage;
- The company is not liable for loss of or damage to luggage.

12.title: Passenger Conduct

13.title: Use of Subcontractors
13.content: The company reserves the right to engage third parties to perform services. In such cases, LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS remains the responsible operator towards the client.

14.title: Limitation of Liability

15.title: Force Majeure
15.content: The company is not liable for failure to fulfil obligations due to circumstances beyond its control.

16.title: Confidentiality
16.content: The processing of personal data is carried out in accordance with the Privacy Policy.

17.title: Applicable Law
17.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.

18.title: Changes to Terms
18.content: The company reserves the right to amend these Terms. The current version is published on the website.
